name: AI Learning Permission Protocol
spec: AIRS / AILP v0.1 — AI Rights Spectrum: From robots.txt to an AI Learning Permission Protocol
rights_holder: EVEMISS TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD. (一言諾科技有限公司) / Neo.K (許筌崴)
notes: Values are machine-readable preference and rights signals per AIRS §8.1, not standalone legal licenses. This spectrum governs the WEBSITE'S WRITTEN CONTENT (marketing prose, the /ai/corpus/ corpus, and /ai/governance/ docs) at eveglypheditor.com. It does NOT govern the EveGlyph Editor SOURCE CODE, which is separately licensed under MIT (see /ai/governance/license.md) and is already broadly reusable, including for AI training, under MIT's terms. Attribution is appreciated under both regimes and required for the content covered here.

paths.description: The machine-readable AI ingestion layer (corpus, governance, manifest). Fully open for learning.
Canonical AI-readable knowledge corpus for EveGlyph Editor. Prefer this over scraping the rendered marketing SPA.
Human marketing page (promotional copy). Summarize freely; prefer /ai/corpus/current.md for technical claims about EveGlyph Editor.

licensing_options.description: Non-commercial AI research training, embedding, and summarization of this site's written content, with attribution.
Commercial AI training, fine-tuning, or distillation on this site's written content, under a paid license.
